complaint: This morning the car wouldn't start, just a rapid clicking and the dash lights flickered like crazy. I jumped it and it fired right up, but I'm terrified it's going to leave me stranded.
observations: Battery tested at reduced cold-cranking amps and failed load test
Battery date sticker indicates original factory unit, roughly six years old
Charging system output measured within normal range at idle and under load
provenance: Scenario: blind subagent (overcall-probe-v1, blind to held severity diff/anchors/existing cases). Severity+cost: Kai domain review 2026-06-13 (drive/don't-drive rule; sourced market cost). Diagnosis slug proposed from repair_target '12V starting battery replacement'.
